race.comment: AELIANA (9) on the quick back-up after running down stablemate Lindermann with a determined victory as fav in the G1 Ranvet Stakes over 2000m at this track last Saturday. At her peak now and gets out to her right trip. Too good for these. VAUBAN (2) stalked the speed when he pulled out plenty first-up with a comfortable win over 2000m in the G3 Sky High here. Back in good order and hard to ignore his G1 The Metropolitan fifth over this trip in the Spring with the 58.5kg. Value player. DUBAI HONOUR (1) UK stayer who won this race first-up last year and has acclimatised well for this. Came to the end of his prep with a battling second at Kempton Park All Weather in the LR Wild Flower Stk last December. Can defy his age and play a leading role. SOUL OF SPAIN (3) improving with racing and this should top him off fourth-up as he heads towards the Sydney Cup. Place best. RIVER OF STARS (7) better run second-up as she heads towards the Sydney Cup. Watch for her late.
